ticker.text: Ocarina of Time Remake officially confirmed for Switch 2 — holiday 2026 window expected
Kingdom Hearts 4 launches October 8 — Switch 2 native, full saga coming with it
Star Fox free demo live on eShop NOW — full game June 25, saves transfer
Final Fantasy Resonance + Switch 2 Sports both land October 22
GTA 6 Trailer 3 a no-show through the entire showcase season — Rockstar says nothing

lead.title: Ocarina of Time Is Coming Back — Nintendo Just Dropped the Direct of the Year
lead.dek: A full Ocarina of Time remake, Kingdom Hearts 4 on Switch 2 with a firm October date, a new Star Fox in sixteen days with a demo out now, and 30+ reveals that turned the Switch 2's quiet year into the most stacked calendar in recent Nintendo history.
lead.author: Romello Morris

poll.question: What was the biggest reveal from the June Nintendo Direct?

options.label: Ocarina of Time Remake — 27 years coming
Star Fox — June 25, demo out now

calendar.title: Star Fox
calendar.sub: Switch 2 · Free demo on eShop now

calendar.title: Kingdom Hearts 4
calendar.sub: PS5 · Xbox · Switch 2 — KH3 demo out now

spotlight.title: PikuNiku 2 Is Real, and 2027 Just Got a Little Sillier
spotlight.blurb: Buried in the Direct's 2027 sizzle reel: PikuNiku 2, the sequel to one of the most charming co-op platformers of the last decade. The original was a 4-hour burst of pure joy about a red blob kicking capitalism in the shins. More of that, please.

comments.name: Marcus T.
comments.body: The Ocarina remake announcement genuinely got me. 99 Metacritic, 27 years, and they're rebuilding it from the ground up instead of another remaster. This is the one Nintendo couldn't afford to get wrong and they know it.

comments.name: Priya S.
comments.body: Kingdom Hearts 4 running natively on Switch 2 is the real story here. Everyone assumed that hardware couldn't do it. Square Enix bringing the ENTIRE saga over with save transfer is how you treat a fanbase right.

comments.name: Devon K.
comments.body: Downloaded the Star Fox demo on my lunch break. The Arwing handles like 64 with modern weight. First Star Fox to actually feel right since 1997 and I will die on this hill.

comments.name: Jade W.
comments.body: KH4 Oct 8, Dragon's Dogma 2 Oct 9, Switch 2 Sports AND FF Resonance Oct 22, then Ocarina for the holidays. October is a financial crime scene. My backlog filed a restraining order.
